description: Automated expansion signal detection and recommendation generation for all paying SENTINEL APEX accounts.

recommendation_types.description: Customer is constrained by current tier limits
recommendation_types.talk_track: You're operating at the ceiling of your current plan. Upgrading removes that constraint and gives you [next tier capabilities].
recommendation_types.csm_action: Schedule upgrade conversation within 5 business days

recommendation_types.description: Customer operates in AI-heavy environment or has expressed AI risk concern
recommendation_types.talk_track: Given your AI initiatives, you need intelligence on prompt injection, model attacks, and AI system vulnerabilities — before they affect your deployment.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Schedule AI Security demo with security architect

recommendation_types.description: Customer managing multiple client or subsidiary environments
recommendation_types.talk_track: You're already running intelligence operations for multiple environments. MSSP tier gives you true tenant isolation, per-client SLA tracking, and white-label reports — at 10–25x less than competitive platforms.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Qualify MSSP opportunity with AE before outreach

recommendation_types.description: Customer requests hunts ad hoc or has no hunt history
recommendation_types.talk_track: Your team is spending analyst cycles building hunt hypotheses from scratch. Our subscription automates that — 5 curated, evidence-based hunt packages per month aligned to your threat profile.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Offer one complimentary hunt to demonstrate value before upsell

recommendation_types.description: Customer requesting custom intelligence analysis beyond standard feed
recommendation_types.talk_track: Your team needs intelligence that's specific to your environment — not just the general feed. Our analysts deliver custom briefings tailored to your sector, threat actors, and ATT&CK coverage gaps.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Offer one complimentary briefing to demonstrate value

recommendation_types.description: Customer still manually compiling board/executive reports
recommendation_types.talk_track: Your CISO is still compiling threat reports manually. We can automate monthly executive briefs and quarterly board summaries — branded, on schedule, zero analyst time.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Show sample executive report during next QBR

recommendation_types.description: Security team growing or new use cases emerging
recommendation_types.proposed_action: Add seats or upgrade to next tier
recommendation_types.talk_track: Your team is growing — SENTINEL APEX should grow with it. Adding seats ensures every analyst has full platform access.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Confirm headcount and propose appropriate seat count

recommendation_types.description: Customer API integration is approaching rate limits
recommendation_types.talk_track: Your SIEM is polling SENTINEL APEX aggressively — great signal of integration success. An API capacity add-on prevents any rate-limit interruptions to your feed.
recommendation_types.csm_action: In-app prompt first. CSM follow-up if prompt not acted on in 3 days.

recommendation_types.description: Customer has compliance or audit requirements for extended data retention
recommendation_types.talk_track: Your compliance team needs 3 years of threat intelligence provenance. Our historical archive keeps your full IOC history, advisory records, and detection lineage available for audit — always.
recommendation_types.csm_action: Include in annual renewal discussion if compliance team engaged

qualification_rules: Health score must be >60 before expansion motion begins
No expansion outreach within 60 days of unresolved P1 ticket
MSSP conversion requires AE qualification call before CSM proposes
ROI calculation must accompany every tier upgrade proposal
No multiple simultaneous expansion motions for same account
Customer must have completed onboarding before any upsell conversation

reporting.generated_for_csm: weekly — top 5 expansion opportunities per CSM
